summary: 已完成五个目标文件的 live backend identity proof，并回收到 local / bind-source / container 三路 SHA256 及 /api/v1/health。message_protocol_mapper.py 与 deps.py 三路一致；community.py、schemas/messages.py、api/v1/endpoints/messages.py 三路不一致。
tests: community.py local vs live bind/container SHA256 do not match.
schemas/messages.py local vs live bind/container SHA256 do not match.
api/v1/endpoints/messages.py local vs live bind/container SHA256 do not match.
